req.title: Appointment scheduling
req.statement: A patient shall schedule an appointment at least 24 hours in advance during provider's available slots.
error_pathways: 422 when slot unavailable or in past

doc.reasoning: The requirement constrains appointment scheduling to: (1) authenticated patients only, (2) slots at least 24 hours in the future, (3) slots that are available on the provider's calendar. This yields three natural partitions: a valid future slot (EP/positive), a slot in the past or within 24 h (NEG/negative), and a slot exactly at the 24-hour boundary (BVA/boundary). A fourth case covers the unavailable-slot error path (DT), and a fifth models the state transition from unauthenticated to authenticated before booking (STC). Together these give full coverage of the stated error pathways (422) and happy path (201).

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
Provider has an open slot at least 48 hours from now
No existing appointment overlaps that slot
actions: Compute a slot timestamp 48 hours from now
POST /appointments with valid patient_id, provider_id, and that slot_time
Capture HTTP response status and body
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_valid_future_slot(auth_client, provider_with_open_slot, cleanup_appointment):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=48)
    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_time.isoformat(),
    }
    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "appointment_id" in body
    assert body["status"] == "scheduled"
    cleanup_appointment(body["appointment_id"])
    notification = <get_provider_notification>(body["appointment_id"])
    assert notification is not None

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_less_than_24h_returns_422
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
Provider has a slot 12 hours from now (within the 24-hour restriction)
actions: Compute a slot timestamp 12 hours from now
POST /appointments with valid patient_id, provider_id, and that slot_time
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Response body error code indicates slot is too soon
No appointment record created in the system
trace: R-HLT-024: error pathway '422 when slot unavailable or in past'
R-HLT-024: constraint 'at least 24 hours in advance'
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_less_than_24h_returns_422(auth_client, provider_with_open_slot):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=12)
    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_time.isoformat(),
    }
    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "error" in body
    assert <error_indicates_too_soon>(body["error"])
    appointments = <list_appointments_for_slot>(provider_with_open_slot, slot_time)
    assert len(appointments) == 0

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24h_boundary_accepted
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
Provider has an open slot exactly 24 hours and 0 seconds from now
actions: Compute a slot timestamp exactly 24 hours from now (plus a 5-second tolerance for network latency)
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: HTTP 201 Created (slot is at the inclusive boundary)
trace: R-HLT-024: constraint 'at least 24 hours in advance' — lower boundary inclusive
R-HLT-024: BVA on the 24-hour minimum advance notice
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_exactly_24h_boundary_accepted(auth_client, provider_with_open_slot, cleanup_appointment):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=24, seconds=5)
    payload = {
        "patient_id": auth_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_time.isoformat(),
    }
    resp = auth_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 201
    body = resp.json()
    assert "appointment_id" in body
    assert body["status"] == "scheduled"
    cleanup_appointment(body["appointment_id"])

tests.name: test_schedule_appointment_unavailable_slot_returns_422
preconditions: Patient is authenticated (valid JWT in session)
Provider's slot 48 hours from now is already booked by another patient
actions: Compute a slot timestamp 48 hours from now that is already occupied
POST /appointments with valid patient_id, provider_id, and that occupied slot_time
Capture HTTP response status and body
expected: Response body error code indicates slot is unavailable
trace: R-HLT-024: error pathway '422 when slot unavailable'
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_schedule_appointment_unavailable_slot_returns_422(auth_client, booked_slot, second_patient_client):
    provider_id, slot_time, existing_appt_id = booked_slot
    payload = {
        "patient_id": second_patient_client.patient_id,
        "provider_id": provider_id,
        "slot_time": slot_time.isoformat(),
    }
    resp = second_patient_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 422
    body = resp.json()
    assert "error" in body
    assert <error_indicates_unavailable>(body["error"])
    original = <get_appointment>(existing_appt_id)
    assert original["status"] == "scheduled"

tests.name: test_unauthenticated_patient_cannot_schedule_appointment
preconditions: No valid authentication token is present (unauthenticated state)
Provider has an open slot 48 hours from now
actions: Compute a slot timestamp 48 hours from now
trace: R-HLT-024: STC — transition from unauthenticated state must be rejected before scheduling
tests.executable:
import pytest
from datetime import datetime, timezone, timedelta

def test_unauthenticated_patient_cannot_schedule_appointment(anon_client, provider_with_open_slot):
    slot_time = datetime.now(timezone.utc) + timedelta(hours=48)
    payload = {
        "patient_id": "patient-anonymous",
        "provider_id": provider_with_open_slot,
        "slot_time": slot_time.isoformat(),
    }
    resp = anon_client.post("/appointments", json=payload)
    assert resp.status_code == 401
    body = resp.json()
    assert "error" in body
    appointments = <list_appointments_for_slot>(provider_with_open_slot, slot_time)
    assert len(appointments) == 0
